Module ProjetGenieLogicel3
Package view

Class GraphView

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
view.GraphView
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class GraphView extends javafx.scene.layout.Pane

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    addBlockedCross(Node node)
    Displays a cross on a node to indicate to the user that the node is locked.
    private void
    applyEdgeStyle(javafx.scene.shape.Line line, Edge edge)
    Displays each edge type with a different design to understand better the interface.
    private javafx.geometry.Point2D
    clampPoint(javafx.geometry.Point2D point)
    Limits a complete point, meaning both x and y at the same time.
    private double
    clampX(double x)
    Set a limit on the horizontal axis to prevent the graph from extending beyond the ToolBox.
    private double
    clampY(double y)
    Set a limit on the vertical axis to prevent the graph from extending beyond the ToolBox.
    void
    clearSelection()
    Clears the current selection (node or edge).
    private javafx.scene.shape.Polygon
    createArrowHead(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)
    Creates a small arrowhead polygon at the end of an edge.

    getAgentColor(Agent agent)
    Returns a stable color for an agent based on its id.
    private javafx.scene.paint.Color
    getNodeColor(Node node)
    Assign a color to a node based on its type.
    private void
    redrawAgents()
    Redraws agents using their current progress on edges.
    private void
    refreshSelection()
    Refreshes the appearance of all nodes and edges according to the current selection.

    renderGraph(Graph graph)
    Renders the graph by drawing nodes, edges, and labels.

      Sets the callback called when a node is clicked.

      handler - node click handler

    • setEdgeClickHandler

      public void setEdgeClickHandler(Consumer<Edge> handler)
      Sets the callback called when an edge is clicked.
      Parameters:
      handler - edge click handler

    • setSelectedNode

      public void setSelectedNode(Node node)
      Updates the selected node and refreshes the visual highlight.
      Parameters:
      node - selected node

    • setSelectedEdge

      public void setSelectedEdge(Edge edge)
      Updates the selected edge and refreshes the visual highlight.
      Parameters:
      edge - selected edge

    • setAgentClickHandler

      public void setAgentClickHandler(Consumer<Agent> handler)
      Sets the callback invoked when an agent is clicked on the graph.
      Parameters:
      handler - consumer receiving the clicked agent

    • setSelectedAgent

      public void setSelectedAgent(Agent agent)
      Highlights the selected agent with a red stroke. Clears any previously selected agent highlight.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to highlight, or null to clear selection

    • clearSelection

      public void clearSelection()
      Clears the current selection (node or edge).

    • refreshSelection

      private void refreshSelection()
      Refreshes the appearance of all nodes and edges according to the current selection.

    • redrawAgents

      private void redrawAgents()
      Redraws agents using their current progress on edges.

    • applyEdgeStyle

      private void applyEdgeStyle(javafx.scene.shape.Line line, Edge edge)
      Displays each edge type with a different design to understand better the interface.
      Parameters:
      line - edge modeling
      edge - considered edge

    • getAgentColor

      private javafx.scene.paint.Color getAgentColor(Agent agent)
      Returns a stable color for an agent based on its id.
      Parameters:
      agent - agent to color
      Returns:
      display color

    • setNodeCreationMode

      public void setNodeCreationMode(boolean active)
      Sets the cursor used while the node creation mode is active.
      Parameters:
      active - true to display the crosshair cursor, false to restore the default cursor

    • setEdgeCreationMode

      public void setEdgeCreationMode(boolean active)
      Sets the cursor used while an editing mode is active.
      Parameters:
      active - true to display the crosshair cursor, false to restore the default cursor

    • setDeleteMode

      public void setDeleteMode(boolean active)
      Sets the cursor used while deletion mode is active.
      Parameters:
      active - true to display the crosshair cursor, false to restore the default cursor

    • createArrowHead

      private javafx.scene.shape.Polygon createArrowHead(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)
      Creates a small arrowhead polygon at the end of an edge.
      Parameters:
      x1 - start x
      y1 - start y
      x2 - end x
      y2 - end y
      Returns:
      arrowhead polygon

      private double clampX(double x)
      Set a limit on the horizontal axis to prevent the graph from extending beyond the ToolBox.

      x - x-axis
      Returns:
      corrected x-coordinate

      private double clampY(double y)
      Set a limit on the vertical axis to prevent the graph from extending beyond the ToolBox.
      Parameters:
      y - y-axis
      Returns:
      corrected y-coordinate

    • clampPoint

      private javafx.geometry.Point2D clampPoint(javafx.geometry.Point2D point)
      Limits a complete point, meaning both x and y at the same time.

      point -
      Returns:
      a new corrected point
